caption: A man with short brown hair and stubble, wearing a black zip-up hoodie over a grey t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones, sits in a recording studio. He is positioned in front of a professional silver microphone on a boom arm, with a background of dark, vertically ribbed acoustic foam panels. As the sequence progresses, the man looks forward and speaks, gesturing with his right hand in the second frame. By the third and fourth frames, he shifts his gaze to his right, slightly opening his mouth as if reacting to something or someone off-camera. The setting remains static throughout the sequence, with no on-screen text or logos visible. The only movement is the man's facial expressions, head shifts, and hand gesture.
